role: Core engine module providing scanning, context resolution, rule enforcement, and reporting capabilities for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Collectively, these components implement the core operational logic of ArchSpine, including file system scanning with ignore rules and git diff integration, architectural rule loading and matching, dependency and relevance analysis using path heuristics and symbol evidence, context resolution for architectural diagnostics, generation of violation fix prompts and reports, system health and usage reporting, and aggregation of spine index data into structured unit collections.

children.role: Core engine class for traversing the spine filesystem and aggregating index and atlas data into structured SpineUnit collections for downstream sync and view operations.
Public API barrel module for the check subsystem, re-exporting core service and CLI runner.
Path resolution utility for the scanning engine, specializing in resolving relative import targets within a source tree.
Engine module for scoring the relevance of dependency candidates and target paths using rule-derived keywords, symbol evidence, and path distance heuristics.
Architectural context resolution engine for dependency analysis and relevance scoring in the ArchSpine mirror system.
LLM prompt template generator for architectural violation fixes.
Public API facade barrel file for the fix service module.
CLI command orchestrator for generating a comprehensive architectural dossier (God Mode report) from the .spine/index directory.
Engine module for generating a comprehensive system info and health report for ArchSpine projects.
Core rule engine for loading, storing, and matching architectural rules against file paths within the ArchSpine system.
Reusable engine utility providing a git command execution client for scanner modules.
Scanner engine utility module providing path normalization, pattern matching with picomatch, and dry-run report formatting for scan operations.
Core file system scanner engine that discovers, filters, and reports repository files using layered ignore rules, git diff integration, and configurable scan policies.
ArchSpine engine module that generates formatted usage and audit reports from the Manifest data store, providing governance visibility without CLI coupling.
